definitions.name: Exchange Below Low Tide
definitions.summary: A shell-vaulted market opens between tides to trade cargo, songs, and drowned testimony.

features.name: returning-water contract table
features.description: Every agreement shortens as seawater climbs its legs.

features.name: drowned voice cabinet
features.description: Shell drawers preserve testimony in the speaker's exact saltwater voice.

features.name: channel-score basin
features.description: Ripples rewrite the safe harbor melody minute by minute.
